title: Compat Delight
description: Adds compatibility between popular mods and Farmer's Delight.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/5FOC7KS.png) 📖 About Compat Delight is an easy way to get 50+ Farmer’s Delight addon integrations in a single mod. Instead of installing a bunch of separate mods, just drop in Compat Delight - and it’ll automatically add content when it detects supported mods. You’ll get new food, knives, block dishes, decorative items, and even some unique mechanics - depending on what other mods you have installed. *** 📃 Features * Themed content: New food, knives, block food, and decor. * Cool Effect: Almost every food gives you a useful effect * Bonus mechanics: Some mods introduce unique food systems or behavior * Cross Compatibility & Integration: Origins, Diet, Create *** ### 📝 Description How it works: You install Compat Delight. That’s it. If you have a supported mod — the addon quietly adds new recipes, items, and more. If not — you still get standalone content to enjoy. You can also disable supported or standalone content through the config file. **List of Supported Mod**

Ad Astra(Forge & Fabric)

Adds 19 new foods, 5 types of knives, and 1 block food.
Integrates with the mod through loot tables and adding meat drops from Ad Astra creatures.

Apotheosis(only Forge)

Adds 18 new foods, 2 types of knives, and 1 block food.
Expands the food variety available in the Apotheosis mod.

Applied Energistics 2(only Forge)

Adds 5 new foods and 5 types of knives.
Integrates with the mod through Applied Energistics 2 crafting recipes.

Ars Nouveau(only Forge)

Adds 48 foods, 11 ingredients, 1 type of knife, 4 crates, 4 cabinets, and 5 cakes.
Integrates with the mod through custom effects from Ars Nouveau.

Biomes O' Plenty(only Forge)

Adds 20 new foods and 1 type of knife.
Expands the food variety available in the Biomes O' Plenty mod.

Blood Magic(only Forge)

Adds 9 new foods and 1 type of knife.
Expands the food variety available in the Blood Magic mod.

Blue Skies(only Forge)

Adds 22 new foods, 7 types of knives, and 3 crates.
Expands the food variety available in the Blue Skies mod.

Born in Chaos(only Forge)

Adds 21 new foods, 1 type of knife, and 1 block food.
Expands the food variety available in the Born in Chaos mod.

Bosses of Mass Destruction(Forge & Fabric)

Adds 13 new foods and 1 type of knife.
Integrates with the mod through loot tables, adding meat and other drops from Bosses of Mass Destruction mobs.

Botania(Forge & Fabric)

Adds 11 new foods, 3 types of knives, and 1 crate.
Integrates with the Botania mod through mana knives.

The Bumblezone(Forge & Fabric)

Adds 13 new foods, 2 types of knives, 2 block foods, and 1 crate.
Expands the food variety available in The Bumblezone mod.

Bygone Nether(only Forge)

Adds 8 new foods and 1 type of knife.
Integrates with the mod through loot tables, adding meat drops from Bygone Nether mobs.

Conjurer(only Forge)

Adds 5 new foods.
Expands the food variety available in the Conjurer mod.

Cyclic(only Forge)

Adds 9 new foods and 2 types of knives.
Integrates with the Cyclic mod by using similar or matching food types.

Deeper and Darker(Forge & Fabric)

Adds 30 new foods, 1 type of knife, 2 crates, and 1 cake.
Integrates with the mod through loot tables, adding meat drops from Deeper and Darker mobs.

Draconic Evolution(only Forge)

Adds 12 new foods, 2 types of knives, and 1 cake.
Integrates with the mod through loot tables, adding meat drops from Draconic Evolution mobs.

Ecologics(Forge & Fabric)

Adds 20 new foods, 2 types of knives, 1 block food, and 4 crates.
Integrates with the mod through loot tables, adding meat drops from Ecologics mobs.

Ender IO(only Forge)

Adds 3 types of knives.
Expands the weapon variety available in the Ender IO mod.

Enigmatic Legacy(only Forge)

Adds 22 new foods and 2 types of knives.
Expands the food variety available in the Enigmatic Legacy mod.

Enlightened End(only Forge)

Adds 14 new foods and 4 types of knives.
Expands the food variety available in the Enlightened End mod.

EvilCraft(only Forge)

Adds 14 new foods and 1 type of knife.
Expands the food variety available in the EvilCraft mod.

Extreme Reactors (Big Reactors)(only Forge)

Adds 1 new food and 8 types of knives.
Expands the food and tool variety available in the Extreme Reactors (Big Reactors) mod.

Forbidden & Arcanus(only Forge)

Adds 21 new foods, 2 types of knives, and 1 block food.
Expands the food variety available in the Forbidden & Arcanus mod.

Friends & Foes(Forge & Fabric)

Adds 9 new foods.
Integrates with the mod through loot tables, adding meat drops from Friends & Foes mobs.

Graveyard(Forge & Fabric)

Adds 9 new foods and 2 types of knives.
Expands the food variety available in the Graveyard mod.

Hexerei(only Forge)

Adds 13 new foods, 1 ingredient, and 1 type of knife.
Integrates with the mod through Hexerei's crafting recipes.

Iron's Spells n' Spellbooks(only Forge)

Adds 20 new foods and 1 type of knife.
Integrates with the mod through custom effects based on food type — boosts the corresponding magic class by 15%, increases total mana for 30 seconds, and speeds up mana regeneration.

Legendary Creatures(only Forge)

Adds 24 new foods.
Integrates with the mod through loot tables, adding meat and other drops from Legendary Creatures mobs.

Malum(only Forge)

Adds 13 new foods and 4 types of knives.
Integrates with the Malum mod through tags compatibility.

Mekanism(only Forge)

Adds 4 types of knives.
Expands the weapon variety available in the Mekanism mod.

Midnight(only Forge)

Adds 15 new foods, 7 types of knives, and 2 crates.
Expands the food variety available in the Midnight mod.

Mowzie’s Mobs(only Forge)

Adds 36 new foods and 1 type of knife.
Integrates with the mod through loot tables, adding meat and other drops from Mowzie’s Mobs creatures.

Mutant Monsters(Forge & Fabric)

Adds 15 new foods.
Integrates with the mod through loot tables, adding meat drops from Mutant Monsters mobs.

Mystical Agriculture(only Forge)

Adds 1 new foods, 7 types of knives, and 1 ingredient.
Integrates with the Mystical Agriculture mod through crafting recipes.

Naturalist(Forge & Fabric)

Adds 14 new foods.
Integrates with the mod through loot tables, adding meat drops from Naturalist mobs.

Nature’s Aura(only Forge)

Adds 11 new foods and 4 types of knives.
Expands the food variety available in the Nature’s Aura mod.

Netherific(only Forge)

Adds 12 new foods and 1 type of knife.
Expands the food variety available in the Netherific mod.

Occultism(only Forge)

Adds 21 new foods and 1 crate.
Expands the food variety available in the Occultism mod.

Oh The Biomes We’ve Gone(Forge & Fabric)

Adds 35 new foods.
Expands the food variety available in the Oh The Biomes We’ve Gone mod.

Outer End(only Forge)

Adds 20 new foods and 1 type of knife.
Expands the food variety available in the Outer End mod.

Rats(only Forge)

Adds 13 new foods and 1 type of knife.
Expands the food variety available in the Rats mod.

Refined Storage(only Forge)

Adds 8 new foods and 3 types of knives.
Expands the food variety available in the Refined Storage mod.

Regions Unexplored(Forge & Fabric)

Adds 14 new foods and 2 types of knives.
Expands the food variety available in the Regions Unexplored mod.

Stalwart Dungeons(only Forge)

Adds 19 new foods and 4 types of knives.
Integrates with the mod through loot tables, adding meat drops from Stalwart Dungeons mobs.

Supplementaries(Forge & Fabric)

Adds 12 new foods and 1 type of knife.
Expands the food variety available in the Supplementaries mod.

Tough As Nails(Forge & Fabric)

Adds 18 new foods.
Integrates with the Tough As Nails mod through tags compatibility.

Tropicraft(only Forge)

Adds 30 new foods.
Expands the food variety available in the Tropicraft mod.

YUNG’s Better Caves

Adds 20 new foods, 1 type of knife, and 1 block food.
Integrates with the mod through loot tables, adding meat drops from YUNG’s Better Caves mobs.

Better End(only Fabric)

Adds 20 new foods and 3 types of knives.
Expands the food variety available in the Better End mod.

Better Nether(only Fabric)

Adds 10 new foods and 2 types of knives.
Expands the food variety available in the Better Nether mod.

Bewitchment(only Fabric)

Adds 15 new foods, one type of knife, and 3 crates.
Expands the food variety available in the Bewitchment mod.

Promenade(only Fabric)

Adds 15 new foods.
Expands the food variety available in the Promenade mod.

*** 🎁 Bonus Info If you install all supported mods, you’ll unlock ~1000 food items, 90+ unique knives, and various decorative elements like crates, block foods, cabinets and more. *** ### 🧾 Credits Some of the original addons were distributed under the **MIT License**, which allows their content to be legally used in this mod. In addition, all necessary permissions from the original creators have been obtained. The current version of this mod is protected under **All Rights Reserved**, due to extensive code and texture changes made during development. ***

Drop your feedback, thx!
